description: An Aligarh police constable has been suspended and booked for allegedly demanding sexual favors from a 25-year-old rape survivor. The constable, Imran Khan, reportedly told the survivor she would only receive help if she met him in a hotel and had sex with him. He also threatened to send her to jail if she reported his misconduct.

description: A prominent gau sevak, 'Farsa Wale Baba', died after his vehicle was hit by a truck on the Agra-Delhi highway in Mathura. The incident, occurring during a suspected cattle smuggling chase, led to protests, stone-pelting, and traffic disruption. Authorities later cleared the jam and are investigating the accident.

description: A self-proclaimed spiritual leader, Ashok Kharat, has been arrested in Maharashtra on sexual assault charges, with the Opposition drawing parallels to the 'Epstein files' due to alleged videos of him assaulting women. His alleged links to ruling alliance politicians have intensified political scrutiny, prompting the formation of an SIT to investigate.

title: Google announces it is shutting down Firebase Studio, less than a year after its launch
description: Google is shutting down its Firebase Studio AI workspace on March 22, 2027, less than a year after its April 2025 launch. The company is consolidating its AI developer offerings, moving lessons learned into Google AI Studio and Google Antigravity. Core Firebase services remain unaffected, with a year-long transition period for users.

title: Gurgaon gets NCR’s 1st LPG vending machine; know all about it
description: Gurgaon unveils India's first LPG ATM, a smart vending machine dispensing lightweight composite cylinders in minutes. This contactless system offers a quick refill solution for residents, allowing 24/7 access and easy digital payment. The pilot project by BPCL aims to enhance convenience and promote the use of modern, safer gas cylinders.
